title: Armor Reimagined
body:
![Render](https://i.gyazo.com/bf2a4599a4a2e1659d2dbf75175c1a5d.png)

### This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

Armor Reimagined finally makes our everyday suits wear worthy of the name "armor"

No more looking like you're wearing a colorful jumpsuit, this new retexture should make the armor feel a lot more sturdy and metallic, while also a lot more realistic! 

When wearing an elytra you'll even have a tiny chestplate as well! (As long as you're wearing leggings)

![Preview](https://i.gyazo.com/76ea5ee7bfe248de1b574ae4c0a42d06.png) 

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)
